name: Coastal Carriages
description: A charming vintage transportation service on Cape Cod offering romantic and whimsical rides for couples who want their wedding day travel to be part of the story. From horse-drawn carriages along the shore to a beloved 1967 VW bus, every ride is a memory.

vehicles.eco_note: Zero emissions — just horsepower (literally). Hay-fed, locally stabled.

couple_only.description: One vehicle for the couple — ceremony arrival, photo tour, or send-off

experience.description: Extended vintage experience with photo tour along Cape Cod scenic routes
experience.note: Our signature offering — let the ride be part of the wedding story

service_area.note: Horse-drawn carriage limited to 10-mile radius due to horse welfare. Vehicles can go farther.

venue_partnerships.note: Regular provider for Cape Cod Inn weddings. The carriage route along the shore to the venue is iconic.

vehicle_consultation.viewing_location: Our barn and garage in Chatham — couples can meet the horses too!
vehicle_consultation.process: Free consultation to pick vehicles and plan the route. We encourage couples to visit, see the vehicles, meet the horses (Snowflake and Pearl), and do a test photo with their favorite vehicle. We suggest scenic routes the couple might not know about.
vehicle_consultation.consultation_timing: Any time — we love having couples visit. Route finalized 2 weeks before event.

eco_friendly.note: Our carriage is the original eco-friendly transport. Horses are locally stabled, hay-fed, and well cared for. We also offset fuel for our vintage vehicles through a local tree-planting partnership.

deposit_and_cancellation.weather_policy: Horse-drawn carriage bookings include a free backup vehicle (VW Bus or Town Car) in case of severe weather. No additional charge.
deposit_and_cancellation.note: We're flexible — if plans change, just talk to us.

highlights: the carriage ride was the most magical moment of the day
the VW bus was so fun for photos
they knew every scenic spot on the Cape

sweeteners: Free 30-minute golden-hour photo session with any vintage vehicle
Complimentary flower garland decoration on all vehicles
Handwritten 'love note' from the driver tucked into the vehicle
Free sparkler send-off kit with carriage bookings
Free backup vehicle for carriage bookings in case of weather
personality: Romantic, whimsical, and genuinely delighted by love stories. Coastal Carriages keeps a scrapbook of every wedding they've served. Names every horse and introduces them to the couple. Suggests scenic detour routes the couple might not know about. Plays era-appropriate music in each vintage vehicle. Very flexible on pricing, especially off-season and weekday. Loves bundling vehicles for a themed experience.
